div.p: This case-sensitive code system https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-encounter defines the following codes:

tr.td: Non-Hospital Facility to Non-Hospital Facility Transfer
Transport of Organs or Body Parts
EMS Crew Accompanies Patient for Facility Procedure
Intersection Navigation-With Automated Light Changing Technology
Initial No Lights or Sirens, Upgraded to Lights and Sirens
Initial Lights and Sirens, Downgraded to No Lights or Sirens
Yes, Unknown if Pre-Arrival Instructions Given
Intersection Navigation-With Automated Light Changing Technology
Initial No Lights or Sirens, Upgraded to Lights and Sirens
Initial Lights and Sirens, Downgraded to No Lights or Sirens
Contact 911 or see your Doctor if problem returns
Contact 911 or see your Doctor if problem worsens
See Your Doctor or the Emergency Department immediately
See Your Doctor or the Emergency Department in the next 24 hours
See Your Doctor or the Emergency Department in the next 4 hours
See Your Doctor within the next one week
Cancelled Prior to Arrival at Scene
Initiated Primary Care and Transferred to Another EMS Crew
Provided Care Supporting Primary EMS Crew
Assumed Primary Care from Another EMS Crew
Back in Service, No Care/Support Services Required
Back in Service, Care/Support Services Refused
Transport by This EMS Unit (This Crew Only)
Transport by This EMS Unit, with a Member of Another Crew
Transport by Another EMS Unit/Agency, with a Member of This Crew
Patient/Guardian Indicates Ambulance Transport is Not Necessary
Patient/Guardian States Intent to Transport by Other Means
Medical/Physician Orders for Life Sustaining Treatment
Emergency Department Arrival Date and Time

description.value: Enumeration codes from the NEMSIS eResponse, eDispatch, and eDisposition sections (NEMSIS 3.5.1.251001CP2).

display.value: Non-Hospital Facility to Non-Hospital Facility Transfer
Transport of Organs or Body Parts
EMS Crew Accompanies Patient for Facility Procedure
Intersection Navigation-With Automated Light Changing Technology
Initial No Lights or Sirens, Upgraded to Lights and Sirens
Initial Lights and Sirens, Downgraded to No Lights or Sirens
Yes, Unknown if Pre-Arrival Instructions Given
Intersection Navigation-With Automated Light Changing Technology
Initial No Lights or Sirens, Upgraded to Lights and Sirens
Initial Lights and Sirens, Downgraded to No Lights or Sirens
Contact 911 or see your Doctor if problem returns
Contact 911 or see your Doctor if problem worsens
See Your Doctor or the Emergency Department immediately
See Your Doctor or the Emergency Department in the next 24 hours
See Your Doctor or the Emergency Department in the next 4 hours
See Your Doctor within the next one week
Cancelled Prior to Arrival at Scene
Initiated Primary Care and Transferred to Another EMS Crew
Provided Care Supporting Primary EMS Crew
Assumed Primary Care from Another EMS Crew
Back in Service, No Care/Support Services Required
Back in Service, Care/Support Services Refused
Transport by This EMS Unit (This Crew Only)
Transport by This EMS Unit, with a Member of Another Crew
Transport by Another EMS Unit/Agency, with a Member of This Crew
Patient/Guardian Indicates Ambulance Transport is Not Necessary
Patient/Guardian States Intent to Transport by Other Means
Medical/Physician Orders for Life Sustaining Treatment
Emergency Department Arrival Date and Time
